# DESIGN.md

<!-- Visual design spec. Generated by design-for-ai. -->

## Design Context

- **Register**: brand
- **Purpose**: help independent musicians sell beats and samples online
- **Audience**: hip-hop and electronic music producers, 18–35, phone-first
- **Personality**: bold, underground, precise
- **DNA**: Dark Modernist — deep neutrals, single electric accent, tight grid, no decoration
- **Archetype**: Creator
- **Primary surface**: phone (mobile-first); secondary: desktop
- **Constraints**: WCAG AA, mobile-first, system fonts acceptable

## Tokens

```css
/* Generated by design-for-ai palette.mjs */
/* seed: hue 265 · chroma: vivid · harmony: mono */

:root {
  --neutral-1: #0d0d11;
  --neutral-2: #131318;

  --neutral-4: #20202b;
  --neutral-5: #272734;
  --neutral-6: #30303e;
  --neutral-7: #3d3d4e;
  --neutral-8: #52526a;
  --neutral-9: #6b6b88;
  --neutral-10: #5e5e79;
  --neutral-11: #9898b8;
  --neutral-12: #e8e8f4;
  --accent-1: #0f0d18;
  --accent-2: #160f22;
  --accent-3: #211432;
  --accent-4: #2a1940;
  --accent-5: #342050;
  --accent-6: #422a64;
  --accent-7: #58387e;
  --accent-8: #7650a8;
  --accent-9: #9b6fd4;
  --accent-10: #8d62c0;
  --accent-11: #c4a2ec;
  --accent-12: #f0e8fc;
  --accent-on-solid: #f0e8fc;
  --background: var(--neutral-1);
  --surface: var(--neutral-2);
  --surface-hover: var(--neutral-3);
  --surface-active: var(--neutral-4);
  --border-subtle: var(--neutral-6);
  --border: var(--neutral-7);
  --border-strong: var(--neutral-8);
  --text-secondary: var(--neutral-11);
  --text: var(--neutral-12);
  --accent-bg-subtle: var(--accent-3);
  --accent-solid: var(--accent-9);
  --accent-solid-hover: var(--accent-10);
  --accent-text: var(--accent-11);
  --error-3: #2e1111;
  --error-9: #d94040;
  --error-11: #f09898;
  --success-3: #0d2214;
  --success-9: #2ea855;
  --success-11: #78d49a;
  --warning-3: #201800;
  --warning-9: #c48500;
  --warning-11: #deb84a;
  --info-3: #0d1422;
  --info-9: #3a72d4;
  --info-11: #90b8f0;
}

   PASS  [light] accent-11 on neutral-2: 5.1:1 (target 4.5:1)
   PASS  [light] accent-on-solid on accent-9: 5.8:1 (target 4.5:1)
```

## Type scale

```
--font-body: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif
--font-display: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif
--text-xs: 0.75rem
--text-sm: 0.875rem
--text-base: 1rem
--text-lg: 1.125rem
--text-xl: 1.25rem
--text-2xl: 1.5rem
--text-3xl: 1.875rem
--text-4xl: 2.25rem
```

## Surface

- Primary: phone — max-width 390px mobile viewport
- Secondary: desktop — 1280px content column, centered
- Touch targets: 44×44px minimum
- Motion budget: reduced (music app — focus on content, not UI)

## Motion

Transitions: 150ms ease-out on state changes only. No entrance animations. `prefers-reduced-motion` always respected.
